acceptance.assertion: Mechanic and Captain sequence logic lives outside the core grip surface file.
Generic run_grip dispatch remains runner-agnostic and has no runner-name special cases.
The refactor does not add merge, deploy, service restart, fleet mutation, or cleanup authority.

goal: Move Mechanic/Captain orchestration out of grabowski_grips.py into a dedicated orchestration module with clearer runner boundaries, without changing grip authority semantics.

metadata.reason: Keep PR #96 focused on boundary semantics and tests.

title: Extract grip orchestration runners
